items.name: Button
items.doc: Generic action button with Fluent-style variants and hover feedback.

items.name: label
items.doc: Text rendered in the button body.

items.name: variant
items.signature: in property <string> variant: Variants.primary;   // primary | secondary | ghost | danger

items.name: enabled
items.doc: Enables pointer interaction and active styling when `true`.

items.name: clicked
items.doc: Fired when the user activates the button.
